title: jumellea majalis
intro: Jumellea majalis, also known as the 'Night-Blooming Orchid', is a rare and nocturnal flowering plant native to Madagascar. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The plant is known to have health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in reducing pain and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Jumellea majalis can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
